images.copyright: Lemon shark pup in mangrove forest, Eleuthera, Bahamas (© Shane Gross/Nature Picture Library)
images.title: Fin-tastic truths
images.caption: Shark Awareness Day
images.desc: On July 14, Shark Awareness Day asks us to trade movie panic for ocean truth. Sharks have patrolled the seas for more than 420 million years, and as apex predators, they help keep marine ecosystems in balance.
